name: Public Joint Stock Company Yakutsk Fuel and Energy Company
summary: Public Joint Stock Company Yakutsk Fuel and Energy Company engages in the exploration, extraction, processing, and selling of natural gas, gas condensate, and liquefied petroleum gas in the Republic of Sakha. The company also develops in the Srednevilyuiskoe and Mastakhskoe gas condensate fields, as well as produces and sells motor fuels. It operates 16 fuel stations and 4 gas stations. The company also exports its products. The company was founded in 1963 and is based in Yakutsk, Russia. Public Joint Stock Company Yakutsk Fuel and Energy Company is a subsidiary of A-PROPERTI, OOO.
